name: sqlite
description: SQLite database access via MCP — read, write, and analyze local SQLite databases

files.pack.toml:
[pack]
name = "sqlite"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "SQLite database access via MCP — read, write, and analyze local SQLite databases"
authors = ["PackWeave"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/PackWeave/registry"
keywords = ["sqlite", "database", "sql", "mcp"]

[[servers]]
name = "sqlite"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-sqlite@latest"]
transport = "stdio"
tools = ["read_query", "write_query", "create_table", "list_tables", "describe_table", "append_insight"]
